title: addyosmani/agent-skills
summary: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents by Google engineer Addy Osmani. Covers code review, testing, and refactoring in real-world development scenarios. 56,824 stars.
chinese_summary: Google 工程师 Addy Osmani 出品的 AI 编码 Agent 工程化技能集，涵盖代码审查、测试、重构等生产级开发场景，56,824 星。
